meaning: n.绂忛煶浼犻亾,鍩虹潱鏁欏寲
examples: John Paul has called for a second evangelization of Europe.
And we need extraordinary power for the task of local and world evangelization.
Throughout his papacy, John Paul has called for a second evangelization of Europe.
The key structure of this model has five phases: Discovery, Experimentation, Evangelization, Formalization and Realization.
Many cardinals had focused their speeches on specific issues, whether it was strategies for evangelization or progress reports on Vatican finances.
